narrative_text: Deep in the Whispering Woods, a brave little fox named Finnegan stands beside a glowing, ancient oak tree. He has just discovered a shimmering golden key hidden among the mossy roots and is deciding whether to pick it up.
branch_summary: A curious fox discovers a magical golden key beneath a glowing ancient tree.
scene_description: A lush, enchanted forest at twilight, where the air is filled with floating specks of golden pollen. The lighting is cool indigo and violet, contrasted by a warm, ethereal amber glow emanating from the base of a massive oak tree. The composition is a medium shot with the fox centered, framed by thick ferns and a moss-covered boulder, creating a sense of intimate discovery.

properties.color: vibrant burnt orange with a snowy white chest and coal-black paw 'socks'
properties.size: medium, roughly the height of a large wildflower
properties.texture: thick, velvety fur with a bushy, white-tipped tail
properties.pattern: solid orange with distinct white markings on face and tail-tip
properties.distinctive_features: bright emerald-green eyes and an oversized, floppy left ear

entities.pose: crouched slightly on all fours, head tilted to the side with one paw lifted mid-air

properties.color: deep charcoal gray bark with veins of glowing amber light in the cracks
properties.size: large, dominating the right side of the frame
properties.texture: rough, craggy bark covered in soft, lime-green moss
properties.pattern: swirling knots that look like sleeping faces
properties.distinctive_features: exposed gnarled roots that form a small hollow at the base

entities.pose: standing tall with heavy branches arching over the scene

properties.size: small, about the size of the fox's nose
properties.pattern: intricate filigree on the handle shaped like wings
properties.distinctive_features: emits a faint trail of sparkling particles

entities.pose: lying flat on a bed of dark green moss

properties.color: slate blue with patches of teal lichen
properties.size: medium, half the height of the fox
properties.pattern: speckled with tiny glittering mica flakes
properties.distinctive_features: a deep crack running down the center

error_exclusions.reason: There is only one fox in the scene.
The key is an inanimate object and does not perform actions.
